transcript: A black notebook fell from the sky, yet strangely, even the reindeer not come near it. Legend has it, that whoever's name is written in this notebook, will die immediately. Hurry up to like and follow it, and ask for protection in the comment section. This scene happened to be just after school light saw, poverty. He immediately brought the book home. As a result, he opened it and the first page reads, that whoever's name is written in the notebook will die. The highly educated, light, immediately laughed at the idea, that there could be such an outrageous notebook. Just then, the name of a murderer on the loose is shown on TV, and Light immediately writes it in the notebook. Surprisingly, however, the news of the murderer's death appeared in the newspaper the next day. Light is a bit surprised. Could this black notebook really be so magical? In order to verify his thoughts, Light found the punk who often bullied him, then took out the notebook and directly wrote the punk's name on it, and the next second, the punk fell dead, it turns out that this is really a death notebook, light immediately ran away, suddenly a sound came from the sky.
